summary: Completed testing of Floating Refine Mode Panel implementation. Backend API tests pass 14/14. Frontend code review confirms all required UI components and styles are properly implemented. Unable to perform live UI testing due to Google OAuth requirement.
critical_code_review_comments: Floating Refine Panel implementation is COMPLETE - all required JSX (lines 3444-3525) and styles (lines 4676-4807) are present
enterRefineMode (lines 648-666) correctly: sets isRefineMode=true, sets isActivelyDrawing=false, clears sections, collapses sidebar via sidebarAnim.toValue(0)
exitRefineMode (lines 669-683) correctly: resets all refine state, expands sidebar via sidebarAnim.toValue(1)
All required styles defined: floatingRefinePanel, refineActionRow, drawNextGroupBtn, reoptimizeBtn, exitRefineBtn, drawingPulse, sectionSummary, sectionPill, etc.
DrawingOverlay component properly integrated at line 2894 with isActive={isActivelyDrawing} and onDrawComplete={handleNativeDrawComplete}
LASSO_COMPLETE and NATIVE_LASSO_COMPLETE message handling implemented at lines 2887-2889 calling completeLassoDrawing()
completeLassoDrawing function (lines 697-737) correctly groups stops inside polygon using isPointInPolygon ray-casting algorithm

data-testid attributes properly added for: refine-mode-controls, drawing-status-bar, cancel-drawing-btn, section-summary, undo-section-btn, draw-next-group-btn, reoptimize-route-btn, exit-refine-mode-btn

success_rate.frontend: N/A - code review only due to OAuth requirement

seed_data_creation: Test stops created with TEST_ prefix and cleaned up after each test
context_for_next_testing_agent: DEV_MODE=true is currently enabled in /app/backend/.env for backend testing. All floating refine mode UI components are implemented. To test frontend UI interactively, need to authenticate via Google OAuth. The 'Refine Route' button appears in sidebar when >= 2 stops exist.

components: DrawingStatusBar (when isActivelyDrawing=true): pulse animation, status text, cancel button
SectionSummary (when drawnSections.length > 0): colored pills showing group count
RefineActionRow: Undo button, Draw Group button, Reoptimize button

styles_verified: floatingRefinePanel (lines 4676-4685): position absolute, dark bg, rounded corners, z-index 20
sectionPill, sectionPillDot, sectionPillText: colored tag pills

drawing_overlay_integration.message_handling: lines 2887-2889: LASSO_COMPLETE and NATIVE_LASSO_COMPLETE call completeLassoDrawing()

lasso_drawing_logic.functionality: Finds stops inside drawn polygon, creates section with unique color, adds to drawnSections state
